properties.name: Tactical Pattern #1546
properties.wounding_strategy: Engine Rationale: Based on an analysis of 5947 conflicts spanning 3,000 years, the engine detected a 7-year cyclical tension threshold. Parallels historical mercantile blockades. Focuses on choking narrow maritime supply routes and subsea data cables. Target vector identified as unhardened Deep Sea Polymetallic Nodes.

properties.name: Tactical Pattern #4163
properties.wounding_strategy: Engine Rationale: Based on an analysis of 5947 conflicts spanning 3,000 years, the engine detected a 7-year cyclical tension threshold. Reflects ancient infrastructure denial tactics, updated for the digital age to target power grids and satellite downlinks. Target vector identified as unhardened Subglacial Resource Deposit.

properties.name: Tactical Pattern #6842
properties.wounding_strategy: Engine Rationale: Based on an analysis of 5947 conflicts spanning 3,000 years, the engine detected a 7-year cyclical tension threshold. Identifies protracted, multi-domain attrition zones designed to drain adversary resources without triggering conventional red lines. Target vector identified as unhardened Equatorial Aerospace Corridor.
